final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing marketing poster for the brand "RAN QIU".

Style/medium: needs an "东方美学" (Eastern aesthetics) minimalist aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include generous negative space, shallow depth of field treatment
Subject: must include the "RAN QIU" brand wordmark as core element
Scene/backdrop: must include natural elements with warm autumn atmosphere
Lighting/mood: needs a "金色时光" (golden hour) warm, poetic and serene atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must include #8B3A1E (deep autumn brown-red), #E8DCCB (beige), #D4A574 (golden brown) — exact ratios and additional tones are yours
Materials/textures: needs a warm, natural surface treatment — exact grain and material choice is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "RAN QIU"
Constraints: must preserve generous negative space, warm color direction, natural poetic mood
Avoid:
